title: ngrok HTTPS Edge
description: An HTTPS Edge defines an HTTPS endpoint with routes and modules that can be configured for traffic management, authentication, and other policies.

id.description: Unique identifier for the HTTPS edge.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the edge was created.

uri.description: URI of the edge API resource.

hostports.description: The host:port combinations that this edge listens on.

routes.description: The routes associated with this HTTPS edge.
